title: THE NAME — ECHO DIRECTOR'S CUT V7

memory_name_01.title: NOAH VOSS RECONSTRUCTION
memory_name_01.description: Use the evidence fragments to restore the erased seventh crew member. Wrong input destabilizes the memory index.

events.text: Access spine is tighter than promised.
My shoulder is learning new shapes.
And something I am not naming yet.
Noah said you already saw his name.
If that is true, it is in records we touched before.
If you asked me what I did...
Memory index is three junctions ahead.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Wall clicked when I passed it.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: It clicked again when I stopped.

events.text: Knees are already filing a complaint.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: I did not make a noise. Legally.

events.text: Rivera hated handwriting on system labels.

choices.text: IGNORE IT AND REACH THE INDEX.

events.text: The drone still has a diagnostic core.
Something is tucked under the core.
If I tear the buffer, we lose it.
The station keeps offering little reasons to stop.
If that was stupid, remember I sounded decisive.
Someone wanted this shut even if the station woke up.
Handle is cold through the glove.
Or bad news pretending to be a temperature.
If I forced this, local cache would wipe.
Trying to look calm for the machine.
Like it is trying not to be noticed.

events.title: CORRUPTED MANIFEST FRAGMENT
events.content:
CREW MEMBER #07
STATUS: ERASED
SURNAME: VOSS
MEMORY INDEX: DAMAGED
SOURCE CONFLICT: OFFICIAL MANIFEST DENIES ENTRY
events.caption: Partially recovered crew record from the personnel memory index.
events.message: [CORRUPTED MANIFEST FRAGMENT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: I do not remember anyone named Voss on ECHO.
Some wake what was shut down.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: I also know I am scared.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: I do not remember the answer.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: That is the part I hate.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: Hale can panic in complete sentences.
I hate the second one more.

events.title: MAINTENANCE LOG
events.content:
Relay inspection completed.
Signal bleed detected on emergency carrier.
Manual reset recommended.

Signed: N. Voss
events.caption: Recovered relay maintenance entry with partial signature.

events.text: I am not okay with how normal that sounds.

choices.text: TELL MAYA TO STEP BACK FIRST.

events.text: It keeps dumping the query into an empty crew slot.
But if I push too hard, it may bite.
I hate that I needed someone else to say that.
I have to keep one hand on it.
If I let go, the fragment drops.
It is hot through the glove.
Enough to make me very polite.

e06_waiting.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Maya is holding the memory core open. No new choices until she returns.

e06_waiting.devNote: Legacy fallback node. Not connected to main story flow because characterBusy resumes through returnNodeId.

events.text: We have the shape of him now.

events.title: IDENTITY FRAGMENT
events.content:
CREW MEMBER #07
SURNAME: VOSS
INITIAL: N.
ROLE CLASS: COMMUNICATIONS
MEMORY INDEX STATE: SUPPRESSED
TRANSFER STATE: CONTRADICTORY
events.caption: Recovered identity fragment assembled from memory index and maintenance records.

events.text: If we enter it, the system may restore him.
Or something may answer to him.
Use exactly what the records support.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: The archive accepts confidence too easily.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: That is how bad systems become worse gods.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: If you do this, do it cleanly.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: We are not inventing a person.
Recovered full name is Noah Voss.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: Saying it feels like turning a handle from the wrong side of a door.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: I will walk you through it.
If the archive screams, hands steady.

events.title: NOAH VOSS
events.content:
NOAH VOSS
ROLE: COMMUNICATIONS SPECIALIST
CLEARANCE LEVEL: OMEGA
STATUS: UNKNOWN
TRANSFER STATUS: DENIED
MEMORY INDEX: SUPPRESSED
LAST KNOWN SIGNAL: 7.14 EMERGENCY CARRIER
NOTE: SUBJECT RECORD RESTORED BY EXTERNAL OPERATOR INPUT
events.caption: Restored crew profile for the erased seventh crew member.

events.text: Nobody says anything for a second.
A deleted man just got his name back.
I do not know whether to be relieved or furious.
The first erased person was the one meant to keep people talking.
Transfer record is still locked behind the profile.
Or we let the carrier answer now.
I hate that both feel urgent.

events.title: TRANSFER RECORD: NOAH VOSS
events.content:
TRANSFER REQUEST: NOAH VOSS
ROLE: COMMUNICATIONS SPECIALIST
STATUS: DENIED
DATE: 21 DAYS BEFORE LAUNCH
REASON: OMEGA CLEARANCE CONFLICT
SECONDARY NOTE: DO NOT ASSIGN TO ECHO
AUTHORIZATION HASH: E.HALE / STATION SYSTEMS
VERIFICATION: PARTIAL
events.caption: Recovered denied transfer record. Authorization hash partially matches Ethan Hale and station systems.
events.message: [TRANSFER RECORD: NOAH VOSS ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Then why was his handwriting in our walls?
Why was his signal in our carrier?
Not where they let you remember me.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: I was the voice behind the static.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: The one you heard before Hale.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: Ask Ethan why he signed the door shut.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: Please tell me you heard the word signed.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Drone tried to wipe the packet.
I kept my hand on it until it stopped fighting.

events.title: DRONE ROUTE CACHE
events.content:
ROUTE CACHE / PARTIAL
DESTINATION: PERSONNEL MEMORY INDEX
RECENT QUERY FRAGMENT: ...N. VOSS...
REQUEST ORIGIN: LOCAL DRONE DIAGNOSTIC CORE
STATUS: HIDDEN, NOT DELETED
events.caption: Recovered route packet hidden inside a damaged maintenance drone.
events.message: [DRONE ROUTE CACHE ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Voss was not only in a manifest.

events.title: HANDWRITTEN CABLE TAG
events.content:
HANDWRITTEN LABEL RECOVERED
TEXT: VOSS
ROUTE: MEMORY INDEX BYPASS
INK AGE: PRE-BLACKOUT
NOTE: REMOVED FROM ORIGINAL CABLE BUNDLE BY HAND
events.caption: Maya recovered a handwritten VOSS cable tag from the service crawl.
events.message: [HANDWRITTEN CABLE TAG ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Just a sealed door and that feeling.
Like we skipped something that wanted to be found.
Maybe ECHO teaching me pattern recognition with knives.
A side core went dark when the hatch popped.
If it had a copy of anything, it is ash now.
That one is on the route we picked.

focus: Removed report-like lines such as Checking/Following/Scanning/Recovery complete and replaced them with lived action.
Reduced and shortened CharacterBusy usage; hatch interactions now play as immediate lived scenes.
Made direct route/no-detour choices produce irreversible Noah breadcrumb loss.
Made force-hatch choice create permanent side-core evidence loss.
Made Noah reveal harder by tying the transfer record to a partial E. Hale authorization hash.
Made UNKNOWN/NOAH messages plot-forward and less generic.
Strengthened Episode 07 start flags for record-saved, Noah-spoke-first, and 7.14-left-open branches.

episodeObjective: Guide Maya through the memory index to reconstruct Noah Voss without turning the archive into a trap; make route choices produce real losses, reduce report language, make Hale/Maya trust visible, and end with a harder Episode 07 hook.

summary: Concrete episode goal remains Noah Voss identity reconstruction.
Maya stays physically active and reports environment, sound, smell, temperature, fear, and physical strain.
Player choices produce visible emotional and operational consequences.
Some clues can be missed permanently.
Maya can become colder toward the operator after trust-breaking choices.
Hale, Maya, and Noah have distinct voices.
First event, then character reaction, then player choice.

notes: Generated from full uploaded Episode_06 JSON.
Legacy e06_waiting remains marked as fallback and is excluded from main-flow reachability expectation.

rulesApplied: Report-style action lines were rewritten into lived, in-the-moment action.
CharacterBusy events reduced and shortened; only traversal/extraction/recovery moments use it.
Route choices now create visible evidence gain/loss and future Noah/Hale trust flags.
Maya remembers Episode 05 accusation through tone, not only flags.
UNKNOWN messages reduced and made plot-forward.
Noah reveal strengthened with Hale-linked erasure evidence and Episode 07 branch flags.
